title: DailyOS Alpha Video 001 - 有醫療險就夠了嗎？

script.title: 有醫療險就夠了嗎？
script.script: 有醫療險，就夠了嗎？醫療險主要幫你處理住院、手術和部分醫療費用。但人生的風險，不只住院而已。像收入中斷、看護費、長期療養、交通雜費，醫療險不一定都會賠。搭配實支實付、重大疾病險、意外險和失能險，保障才比較完整。保險不是花錢，是讓人生多一點選擇權。有醫療險不等於夠保障，做對規劃，讓風險不變成負擔。關注我們，學會聰明保險，守護你所愛的人。

character.name: Friendly Insurance Host
character.outfit: Clean cream top with soft neutral styling
character.brandAttributes: Trustworthy, warm, clear, professional, insurance education

storyboard.visual: Friendly female presenter points upward beside a large question bubble.
storyboard.subtitle: 有醫療險就夠了嗎？

storyboard.visual: Hospital icon and medical bill cards appear beside the presenter.
storyboard.narration: 醫療險主要幫你處理住院、手術和部分醫療費用。
storyboard.subtitle: 醫療險主要幫你付住院費

storyboard.visual: Four cards show income loss, caregiver cost, long-term care, and transport.
storyboard.narration: 但人生的風險，不只住院而已。像收入中斷、看護費、長期療養、交通雜費，醫療險不一定都會賠。
storyboard.subtitle: 這些費用，醫療險不一定賠！

storyboard.visual: Checklist highlights實支實付,重大疾病險,意外險,失能險.
storyboard.narration: 搭配實支實付、重大疾病險、意外險和失能險，保障才比較完整。
storyboard.subtitle: 搭配這些保險，才有完整保障！

storyboard.visual: Presenter makes an encouraging fist beside piggy bank and sparkles.
storyboard.narration: 保險不是花錢，是讓人生多一點選擇權。
storyboard.subtitle: 保險不是花錢，是讓人生更有選擇權！

storyboard.visual: Reminder note board with the presenter pointing at the main message.
storyboard.narration: 有醫療險不等於夠保障，做對規劃，讓風險不變成負擔。
storyboard.subtitle: 有醫療險 ≠ 夠保障。做對規劃，讓風險不變成負擔！

storyboard.visual: Presenter forms a heart gesture with soft call-to-action text.
storyboard.narration: 關注我們，學會聰明保險，守護你所愛的人。
storyboard.subtitle: 關注我們，學會聰明保險，守護你所愛的人！

config.renderTarget: Manual Gemini / Google AI Studio handoff

gemini.visualStyle: Warm, bright, trustworthy insurance education short
gemini.characterReferenceNotes: Female insurance knowledge host, age 30-40, natural, friendly, professional, consistent cream outfit and warm brown shoulder-length hair.
gemini.voiceAudioDirection: Natural Traditional Chinese narration, warm and clear, medium speed, friendly insurance educator tone.
gemini.subtitleDirection: Traditional Chinese subtitles, large readable text, high contrast
